description:
Record of an operation of a known type, origin, and outcome executed during a benchmark.

monitoring.benchmarker.reports.report.BenchmarkOperation, as defined in monitoring/benchmarker/reports/report.py

$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

query.description: The query details for this operation, if this was a query operation and query details are being recorded.

t1.description: Time this operation completed, either successsfully or in failure.
